segments.text: For three transgressions of Moab, and for four, I will not turn away the punishment thereof; because he burned the bones of the king of Edom into lime:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But I will send a fire upon Moab, and it shall devour the palaces of Kerioth: and Moab shall die with tumult, with shouting, and with the sound of the trumpet:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And I will cut off the judge from the midst thereof, and will slay all the princes thereof with him,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For three transgressions of Judah, and for four, I will not turn away the punishment thereof; because they have despised the law of the LORD, and have not kept his commandments, and their lies caused them to err, after the which their fathers have walked:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But I will send a fire upon Judah, and it shall devour the palaces of Jerusalem.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For three transgressions of Israel, and for four, I will not turn away the punishment thereof; because they sold the righteous for silver, and the poor for a pair of shoes;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: That pant after the dust of the earth on the head of the poor, and turn aside the way of the meek: and a man and his father will go in unto the same maid, to profane my holy name:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And they lay themselves down upon clothes laid to pledge by every altar, and they drink the wine of the condemned in the house of their god.
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: the condemned: or, such as have fined, or, mulcted

segments.text: Yet destroyed I the Amorite before them, whose height was like the height of the cedars, and he was strong as the oaks; yet I destroyed his fruit from above, and his roots from beneath.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Also I brought you up from the land of Egypt, and led you forty years through the wilderness, to possess the land of the Amorite.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And I raised up of your sons for prophets, and of your young men for Nazarites. Is it not even thus, O ye children of Israel?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But ye gave the Nazarites wine to drink; and commanded the prophets, saying, Prophesy not.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Behold, I am pressed under you, as a cart is pressed that is full of sheaves.
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: I am…: or, I will press your place, as a cart full of sheaves presseth

segments.text: Therefore the flight shall perish from the swift, and the strong shall not strengthen his force, neither shall the mighty deliver himself:
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: himself: Heb. his soul, or, life

segments.text: Neither shall he stand that handleth the bow; and he that is swift of foot shall not deliver himself: neither shall he that rideth the horse deliver himself.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And he that is courageous among the mighty shall flee away naked in that day,
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: courageous: Heb. strong of his heart
